title: Toulon, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Toulon, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Toulon is a city in Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur with a population of 176,000. A major Mediterranean naval port with a stunning harbor, beautiful beaches, and the majestic Mont Faron overlooking the city.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
